titleStmt.title: SII 34.317: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 317. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the west wall of the Bṛihadamba shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, Achyutadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1453, Nandana, Dakshiṇāyana, Dhanus, sudi 11, Friday, Rēvati = Probably A.D. 1532, November 8, Friday.

Gift of tax-free land by the nāṭṭavar of Valla-nāḍu for the rituals and worship in the maṭha of Tiruppuṉaivāsa-mudaliyār situated in the bazaar called Valla-nāḍaṉ-perunderu in the village Araṅgulanādar-tiruppaḍaivīḍu. The nāṭṭavar undertook the responsibility of paying all the taxes on the gift land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu śrīman rācaparamEśvara śrīvīra[ piṟatā] Accutta tEva mahārāyar pṛthvi yam paṇṇi
yaruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 5 10 3kku mēl cellā niṉṟa ṉantaṉa samvatcarattu dakṣaṇāyanattu dhanunāyaṟṟu
pūrvvapakṣattu Ēkādaśiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa rēvati nāḷ Irācavaḷanāṭṭu vallanāṭṭu ṉāṭāka Icainta ṉāṭṭavarō
m tampirāṉār Araṅkuḷanātar tiruppaṭaivīṭṭil vallanāṭaṉ perunteruvāṉa teṟkutteruvil nayinār tiruppuṉai
vācamutaliyār maṭattut tirucaivapūcai gurupūcai māheśvara pūcai ṉaṭattumpaṭikkum tāṉaṅkiḻamai nīṅkalāka maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭa ti
yāka vinōtavayalukkup peruṉāṉ kellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai m pittilāṉukku mēṟkum teṉpāṟkel
lai ṉāṭṭuk kuḷattuvāykku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai vikkirama cōḻaṉ kālvāykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
tampirānār Araṉkuḷanātar tēvatānaṅkuḷattu vayallellaikkūṉṟiṉa kallukkut teṟkum Ā
ka Icainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nīrnilaṅkaḷum puñcaikaḷum puṟṟun tiṭṭum kīḻṉō
kkiya kiṇaṟum mēnōkkiya maramum Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum Ākkuvaṉa Ākkiyum kuḻippaṉakuḻittum U
yappaṉa Uyattum vēṇṭiṉa tānadhamana vikkirayaṅkaḷukkurittākkumpaṭi cantirātitta varaiyum
caṟuvamāniyamākac cella kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkuṭuttōm Intat ti yāka vinōtaṉ
vayalukku varum Iṟai muṟaimai veṭṭi muṭṭāḷ Āḷttēvai Ērt tēvai kūṟṟari
ci yiṉavaruci Antarāyam maṟṟum vēṇṭukaḷiṉyōkam Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṭāka mē
ṟp pōṭṭukkoṇṭum maṭappuṟam caṟumāniyamāka kal veṭṭikkuṭuttōm Anta ma
ṭappuṟam tāṉ vēṇṭiya kuṭi muṭṭi yamutu peṟakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku vallaṉāṭṭu
nāṭāka Icainta nāṭṭavarōm Ippaṭikku nāṭṭār coṟpaṭikku nāṭṭukkaṇa
kku niṉpavaṉapperumāḷ kantarāyar Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku nāṭṭār coṟpaṭikku cevvanti
kāliṅkarāyar Eḻuttu ..śubhamastu ..
Digital edition of SII 34.317 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
